resources.title: Get Loud Arkansas
resources.shortDescription: Independent Arkansas civic-engagement organization focused on voter registration, turnout, and civic education.
resources.fullDescription: Get Loud Arkansas is a nonpartisan civic-engagement organization that registers voters, mobilizes turnout, expands voting access, and provides civic education across Arkansas communities.
resources.ownershipDisclosure: Resource provided by Get Loud Arkansas. Block-Street does not operate this website.

resources.title: Get Loud Easy Application
resources.shortDescription: Independent tool that helps prepare Arkansas's paper voter-registration application. Not an online registration portal.
resources.fullDescription: The Get Loud Easy Application is operated by Get Loud Arkansas on Jotform. It assists with preparing Arkansas's paper voter-registration application. Block-Street does not receive information entered into the form.
resources.ownershipDisclosure: Get Loud Arkansas provides this independent voter-registration assistance tool. Block-Street does not operate the form or receive the information you enter.
resources.completionDisclosure: You are not registered until your county clerk accepts your application. Follow the instructions displayed by Get Loud Arkansas when you use the form.
resources.confirmationGuidance: Follow up with your county clerk or Arkansas VoterView to confirm your registration status.

resources.title: Arkansas voter registration information
resources.shortDescription: Official Arkansas Secretary of State voter registration information.
resources.fullDescription: Official voter registration procedures, forms, and guidance from the Arkansas Secretary of State Elections Division.

resources.title: Arkansas VoterView
resources.shortDescription: Official Arkansas voter registration lookup and polling place information.
resources.fullDescription: Use Arkansas VoterView to verify registration status and find polling places through the Secretary of State.
resources.confirmationGuidance: Use Arkansas VoterView to confirm your registration was accepted.

outreachTokens.get_loud_short_disclosure: Get Loud Arkansas provides this independent voter-registration assistance tool. Block-Street does not operate the form or receive the information you enter.
